entries.definition:
ʿ–w–l to swerve; to be unjust; to have a large number of
children; to increase; to be dependable. There is a degree of
overlapping between some derivations of this root and the root
entries.definition_english:
ʿ–w–l to swerve; to be unjust; to have a large number of
children; to increase; to be dependable. There is a degree of
overlapping between some derivations of this root and the root
